queries.name: gds_version
queries.cypher: RETURN gds_version() IS NOT NULL AS has_version

queries.name: sssp_call_returns_rows
queries.cypher: CALL sssp() YIELD node, distance RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: sssp_source_distance_zero
queries.cypher: CALL sssp() YIELD node, distance WHERE distance = 0.0 RETURN COUNT(*) AS cnt
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 33: no viable alternative at input 'CALL sssp() YIELD node, distance WHERE'

queries.name: sssp_all_non_negative
queries.cypher: CALL sssp() YIELD node, distance WHERE distance IS NOT NULL RETURN MIN(distance) >= 0 AS ok
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 33: no viable alternative at input 'CALL sssp() YIELD node, distance WHERE'

queries.name: sssp_alias_shortest_path
queries.cypher: CALL shortest_path() YIELD node, distance RETURN COUNT(*) AS row_count

queries.name: sssp_distance_scalar
queries.cypher: CALL sssp() YIELD * RETURN COUNT(*) AS primed
queries.errorMessage: Syntax error at line 1, column 18: no viable alternative at input 'CALL sssp() YIELD *'

queries.name: has_path_a_to_b
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:City {id:0}), (b:City {id:1}) RETURN has_path(id(a), id(b), 3) AS reachable

queries.name: has_path_a_to_e
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:City {id:0}), (e:City {id:4}) RETURN has_path(id(a), id(e), 5) AS reachable

queries.name: k_hop_call_yields_rows
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 2) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows

queries.name: k_hop_max_hops_bound
queries.cypher: CALL k_hop(maxHops := 1) YIELD node, source, hops RETURN MAX(hops) <= 1 AS bounded

queries.name: var_length_path_call
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 2) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows

queries.name: var_length_path_lengths_bounded
queries.cypher: CALL variable_length_path(maxHops := 2) YIELD source, target, length, path RETURN MAX(length) <= 2 AS bounded

queries.name: var_len_alias
queries.cypher: CALL var_length_path(maxHops := 1) YIELD source, target, length RETURN MIN(length) >= 1 AS ok
